mapper.sql: select record_id, user_id, patient_id, session_id, `role`, content, memory_type, create_time, update_time from ai_chat_record
mapper.insert:
insert into ai_chat_record
user_id, patient_id, session_id, `role`, content, memory_type, create_time, update_time,
#{userId}, #{patientId}, #{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{memoryType}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT session_id FROM ai_chat_record WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} and memory_type = 'short' GROUP BY session_id ORDER BY MAX(create_time) DESC

select ea.apply_id as applyId, ea.apply_type as applyType, ea.apply_time as applyTime, mt.tech_name as techName, er.item_name as itemName, er.result_value as resultValue, er.result_unit as resultUnit, er.reference_range as referenceRange, er.abnormal_flag as abnormalFlag, er.image_find as imageFind, er.diagnosis_opinion as diagnosisOpinion, er.diagnosis_result as diagnosisResult, er.suggestion as suggestion, er.report_time as reportTime from exam_result er inner join exam_apply ea on er.apply_id = ea.apply_id left join medical_technology mt on ea.tech_id = mt.id where ea.patient_id = #{patientId} and er.status = '1' order by er.report_time desc, ea.apply_id desc, er.sort asc, er.result_id asc limit #{limit}
select dept_id as deptId, dept_name as deptName from sys_dept where del_flag = '0' and status = '0' order by order_num, dept_id

select ss.slot_id as slotId, ss.schedule_id as scheduleId, ss.doctor_id as doctorId, d.doctor_name as doctorName, d.dept_id as deptId, sd.dept_name as deptName, d.level_id as levelId, rl.level_name as levelName, rl.fee as fee, date_format(ss.schedule_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as scheduleDate, date_format(ss.start_time, '%H:%i') as startTime, date_format(ss.end_time, '%H:%i') as endTime, greatest(ifnull(ss.max_number, 0) - ifnull(ss.reserved_number, 0), 0) as availableNumber from schedule_slot ss inner join doctor d on d.doctor_id = ss.doctor_id left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = d.dept_id left join regist_level rl on rl.level_id = d.level_id
ss.status = '0' and ss.reserved_number < ss.max_number and d.dept_id = #{deptId} and ss.schedule_date = #{scheduleDate} and d.doctor_name like concat('%', #{doctorName}, '%') and date_format(ss.start_time, '%H:%i') >= #{startTime} and date_format(ss.end_time, '%H:%i') <= #{endTime} and exists (select 1 from sys_user_role ur where ur.user_id = d.user_id and ur.role_id = #{roleId})
order by ss.schedule_date, ss.start_time, d.level_id desc, d.doctor_id
